security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-src 'none'
